title: Asset Index
subtitle: sqlite query layer
description: Local SQLite indexes, one per asset source, built from pack manifests or folder scans. Serves fast page, search, filter, pack, and model lookups for Asset Viewer and agent search without rescanning sources on each request.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset Index contract: one generated SQLite database per source, explicit rebuild/refresh, public query API, no watch mode, and boundary with Pack Manifest, folder scans, and Asset Viewer.

children.title: index.mjs
children.description: Builds and queries the local asset SQLite index from pack manifests or folder scans.
children.role: asset index API and rebuild helper
